title: CASOMAN 6PCS ABS Socket Organizer, 1/4-Inch, 3/8-Inch, 1/2-Inch, Premium Quality Socket Holders, Blue & Red Socket Rails
features: Heavy duty molded ABS marterial, allows for shallow or deep, metric or SAE (Inch) sockets.
Spring loaded ball bearings on each clip hold sockets firm and secure. Convinient to use, easy to snap-on and off
Holds up to 86 sockets in two color: Blue: 16 x 1/4" Dr. clips, 15x 3/8”Dr. clips, 12 x 1/2" Dr. clips. Red: 16 x 1/4" Dr. clips, 15x 3/8”Dr. clips, 12 x 1/2" Dr. clips.
Removable end cap, add or remove clips easily.
Organize your toolbox, mount on a wall vertically or horizontally, set it on your workbench, or store it in a drawer; 1/4-inch, 3/8-inch, 1/2-inch driver socket.
description: Product Description Set include: 1/4" Drive x 32 clips 3/8" Drive x 30 clips 1/2" Drive x 24 clips CASOMAN 6PC ABS Socket Organizer, 1/4-Inch, 3/8-Inch, 1/2-Inch, Premium Quality Socket Holders (6-Piece Set, Blue & Red) Description This CASOMAN 6 piece set socket organizer is made from the quality material ABS and ensure they stand up to a longer service time. The socket organizers save your working time, keep the workspace clean and make sure you will not lose any socket again. You can organize your toolbox, mount on a wall vertically or horizontally, set on your workbench, or store in a drawer. Removable end cap, add or remove clips easily. Spring loaded ball bearings on each clip hold sockets firm and secure. Convinient to use, easy to snap-on and off Organize your toolbox, mount on a wall vertically or horizontally, set it on your workbench, or store it in a drawer.
